song_details.name: Sri Lakshmi Varaham
song_details.arohanam: S R2 G2 M1 D2 S ||

content.swara: 1. S - D - m - G gr R | S - - rg M - D - ||
content.sahitya: Shree Lak shmi Va raa-- ham- - Bha- je - ham-

content.swara: 1. DM D - S - S D S | R - R G gr R S - ||

content.swara: R m - g - r - s d rs gr - mg M | d r s - s d m - d s - s D m gm D ||
